insights.message: Low capital efficiency — ROE 4.0% (<10%) in FY2025
Profits are cash-backed — CFO/Net Profit ratio 7.10x in FY2025
Strong Free Cash Flow generation — 66.2% margin in FY2025

anomalies.message: Net profit fell -71.3% YoY in FY2025 — significant earnings deterioration
Free cash flow has been negative for 2+ consecutive years ending FY2023 — sustained cash burn
